title: NUNG CIANGIN I ZO DING HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I mai-ah koih khin zo hi,
Thaman la ding pai un ci,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nung ciang a kiang kimu ding, Nung ciang a kiang kimu
Nung cianga Topa Jesuh tawh mang ding hi.
Nung ciang a kiang kimu ding, Nung ciang a kiang
Nung cianga Topa Jesuh tawh mang ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lam hong hilh bang zui ding
I tun nading inn nuam ah,
Hong zui un, ci’n hong sam hi,
Upna bangin khial lo-in, Hong nai

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I inn ding Vantung om hi,
A kamciam peel ngei lo hi,
phat ding hi, Hong nai hi.
